# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
  - name: webserver-instance
    type: compute.v1.instance
    properties:
      machineType: n1-standard-1
      disks:
        - boot: true
          autoDelete: true
          initializeParams:
            image: debian-11
      networkInterfaces:
        - network: default
      metadataStartupScript: |
        # Install and configure web server here

  - name: database-instance
    type: sql.v1.databaseInstance
    properties:
      name: my-database
      databaseVersion: MYSQL_8
      instanceSize: db-custom-1-384
      rootPassword: [YOUR_ROOT_PASSWORD]

  - name: storage-bucket
    type: storage.v1.bucket
    properties:
      name: my-bucket

  - name: load-balancer
    type: compute.v1.forwardingRule
    properties:
      target: webserver-instance
      portRange: 80
      ipProtocol: TCP
      sourceRanges:
        - 0.0.0.0/0
